name: Suspicious VPN Usage Detected
description: An unusual pattern of VPN connections has been detected, potentially indicating data exfiltration or unauthorized command and control activity.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the earliest event in the aggregation window.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account associated with the suspicious VPN connections.

parameters.name: dest_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address to which the VPN connections were established.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The aggregated number of VPN connection events within the timeframe.
